notes: RE-ASSESSED post-#719+#766+golden-summary surfacing, REVISED after the failed single-turn recording. TWO trivial turns are required: decoding the failed 1.8 recording's captured store shows gen_metadata holds only an idx=0 row with contextTokens=0 — agy records ZERO in-context tokens after the FIRST turn, so context only accrues from turn 2 (5.1's multi-turn recording got total_tokens=16316). SESSION MODEL: single-birth, NO presession. The failed recording's events.jsonl starts lifecycle at transcript_new for the conv-id session (4acd1802…) then state-transitions on that SAME conv-id — there is NO presession_created / proc-<PID> / pid_discovered for this cell (matches the 5.1 sibling and 1.1/1.2/1.4; only 1.3 long-idle mints a presession, and only because it warms up to bind a live PID). So session_birth anchors to start UNPINNED, no two-phase presession model. On each turn_done applyDBMetrics (parser.go:180) reads conversations/<conv>.db and sets ModelName (canonical resolvable id, NOT 'unknown') + Tokens.Total = context-occupancy tokens (gen_metadata field #5); #766's StageReplayStore captures+serves the store and finalizeSummary (metrics.go:52-59) lifts the store vector into the golden summary, so context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero are verify-checkable after the 2nd turn. tokens_nonzero is deliberately NOT asserted — it reads cum_input+cum_output (observations.go:37) which antigravity never feeds. COST is NOT asserted — antigravity persists no cost (deferred #716). Model left PROVISIONAL — record fills the exact canonical id from the live recording (the failed recording decoded 'gemini-pro-default'; confirm live, do not pin).

text: Conv-id-keyed session appears in ready after the first turn (when agy writes transcript.jsonl). Single-birth: anchored to start, no presession proc-row reconcile (the recording starts at transcript_new for the conv-id, no presession_created).
Turn 1: the trivial prompt drives the session ready -> working on the first transcript activity

Turn 1 completes back to ready (terminal MODEL/PLANNER_RESPONSE, no tool_calls); applyDBMetrics reads the store but contextTokens is still 0 after the first turn, so context metrics are NOT yet asserted here
Turn 2: the follow-up prompt drives the SAME conv-id session ready -> working

Turn 2 completes back to ready; by this turn_done agy's store has recorded non-zero contextTokens, so the served store + capacity table give context_window > 0 and context_utilization_percentage > 0 (the context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero observations). ModelName is the resolved boot model, not 'unknown'.
